title: Feature promoted ScoreVersions and move champion crown icon
description: Champion rows in the score-version sidebar should show a trailing crown instead of a leading icon, and promotion paths should set ScoreVersion.isFeatured to string true so former champions remain starred.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented locally: champion sidebar row now renders crown in trailing action slot, frontend promotion marks incoming ScoreVersion isFeatured='true', and MCP plexus_score_set_champion does the same while preserving champion-history metadata. Validation: dashboard npm run typecheck passed; MCP/tools/score/scores.py py_compile passed.
